name: Activation Funnel - DailyStack

native.query:
-- Activation funnel (replace :start_date and :end_date in Metabase)
SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS day,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE event_name = 'signup_completed') AS signups,
  count(DISTINCT user_id) FILTER (WHERE event_name = 'first_subscription_added') AS first_added,
  count(DISTINCT user_id) FILTER (WHERE event_name = 'second_subscription_added') AS second_added,
  count(DISTINCT user_id) FILTER (WHERE event_name = 'aha_moment_seen') AS aha_seen
FROM user_events
WHERE created_at BETWEEN {{start_date}} AND {{end_date}}
GROUP BY day
ORDER BY day;

description: Daily activation funnel: signups → add1 → add2 → aha
